steps.title: Identify the claim
steps.content: The text says spoiler-readers reported greater enjoyment than non-spoiler-readers, but the size of the difference varied across stories. The blank should name the two stories that best illustrate varying spoiler effects (one with a large gap, one with a small gap).

steps.title: Match the data
steps.content:
From the graph, "Owl Creek Bridge" and "A Chess Problem" show notably different spoiler-vs-unspoiled gaps — illustrating how the degree of difference varies.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
